name: NONE
desc: Signifies the end of one pass through the fault list
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: ECTSensorInputLow
desc: Normally set if the coolant sensor wire is shorted to ground
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: ECTSensorInputHigh
desc: Set if the coolant sensor wire is disconnected or open
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: ECTRangeHigh
desc: Coolant sensor has measured an excessive temperature or shorted to GND
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: ThrottleSensorInputLo
desc: TPS1 signal wire is open
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: ThrottleSensorInputHi
desc: TPS1 signal wire is shorted
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: ThrottleSensorRangeLo
desc: TPS Sensor malfunction
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: ThrottleSensorRangeHi
desc: TPS Sensor malfunction
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: ETCSticking
desc: ETC driver signal wire is open or the throttle plate is sticking inside the throttle body
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: PredictedTPSDifference
desc: TPS1 is different than calculated position
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: ETCSpringTestFailed
desc: Throttle return spring failed keyup test
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: ETCDriverFault
desc: Throttle driver over-current or driver signals shorted
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: MapSensorInputLow
desc: MAP signal disconnected or open circuit
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: MapSensorInputHigh
desc: MAP signal shorted or sensor failure
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: IATSensorInputLow
desc: TMAP sensor failure or shorted circuit
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: IATSensorInputHigh
desc: TMAP disconnected or IAT signal open
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: EST1Low
desc: Coil driver signal low or under current
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: EST1High
desc: Coil driver signal high or over current
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: LowOilPressure
desc: Low engine oil pressure
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: BatterySensorInputLow
desc: Battery voltage measured below 8.0 VDC
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: BatterySensorInputHigh
desc: Battery voltage measured above 15.9 VDC
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: XDRPSensorInputLow
desc: Measured sensor transducer power is below 4.6 VDC
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: XDRPSensorInputHigh
desc: Measured sensor transducer power is above 5.2 VDC
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: Pedal1SensorInputLo
desc: APP1 signal disconnected, open circuit or sensor malfunction
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: Pedal1SensorInputHi
desc: APP1 sensor failure or shorted circuit
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: Pedal1SensorRangeLo
desc: APP1 potentiometer malfunction
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: Pedal1SensorRangeHi
desc: APP1 potentiometer malfunction
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: Pedal2SensorInputLo
desc: APP2 sensor failure or shorted signal
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: Pedal2SensorInputHi
desc: APP2 signal disconnected, open circuit or sensor malfunction
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: Pedal2SensorRangeLo
desc: APP2 potentiometer malfunction
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: Pedal2SensorRangeHi
desc: APP2 potentiometer malfunction
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: Pedal1ToPedal2Difference
desc: Measured APP2 pedal position signal is different than APP1 signal
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: AFRTrimValveOutput
desc: FTV modulation driver signal fault
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: AFRTrimValveLowerDC
desc: FTV duty cycle at lower (LEAN) limit
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: AFRTrimValveUpperDC
desc: FTV duty cycle at upper (RICH) limit
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: O2SensorSwitching
desc: O2 sensor not switching across the reference AFR voltage
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes

name: OxygenSensorInputHigh
desc: O2 sensor signal shorted to +5 VDC
source: Daewoo LT7500-E4 Tier II Fuel System Fault Codes
